Symbol of Transal  

Description

3: Increase Max Hitpoints by 107 (L11) to 103 (L20)
4: Increase HP when cast by 107 (L11) to 103 (L20)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 55 Skill: Abjuration
Casting Time: 3.5 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 100
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Beneficial Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: The symbol of Transal flashes before your eyes.
Cast on other: Soandso is cloaked in a shimmer of glowing symbols.
Effect Fades: The mystic symbol fades.

Game Description

Covers your target in a shimmer of holy runes, increasing their hit points for 27.0 mins.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Symbol of Transal

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Symbol of Transal
ClassLevel
PAL24
CLR11
Expansion:

Duration:
27.0 mins
  • Comments (17)

HP

# Jan 18 2018 at 10:09 AM Rating: Excellent
Gidono
View User Forum
Moderator
6,835 posts
Senbian wrote:
Senbian wrote:
This only gave me 34hp at level 13 on Agnarr. I dunno if they nerfed the spell down for the server.


Also double checked on a live server, its only giving fixed 34hp.


Both of those SPA's need to be worked on. 69 and 70.

It should read,

3: Increase Max Hitpoints by 34. Max: 73
4: Increase HP when cast 34. Max: 73

As of the September 13, 2004 patch this spell no longer costs a cat's eye agate to cast. Clerics rejoice.

Elvanaria Blueleaf
Divine Servant of Tunare

13 posts
palladins too rejoice
▲ Page top
waste of time now
QuoteReply
# May 01 2004 at 4:19 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786302754
83 posts
this spell is a waste of time at this level and at this point in time. The spell "temperance" available to level 44 cleric overwrites ALL +hp spells. my guess is yer in Pal Caverns at this level. most of yer group members have found "temperance" in the Plane of Knowledge, just ask them. (avail to levels 1 to infinity). Temp is almost always avail there nowadays.
▲ Page top
RE: waste of time now
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2004 at 1:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258256829
Scholar
31 posts
A) Temperance didn't always exist, I believe it was only with the Ykesha expansion that it came out.

B) This spell is perfectly fine for the level it is given at, considering not everyone is a twink or wants to be one. The spells were designed on the target not being twinked to begin with.

C) Temperance is nice, but you shouldn't have to rely on it for levelling, nor should you have to actively seek someone out for it every time you hunt. People got by just fine before Ykesha came out.
▲ Page top
RE: waste of time now
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2004 at 7:47 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263858046
Scholar
35 posts
I don't think this spell is a waste of time at all, it's a great spell for a pally when they are soloing or in a group with no cleric. Which can happen alot. And running to pok just to get temp is not always the thing to do, that can leave your other group members pissed while you are gone and taking up a group slot, ya might just get booted. -.-
▲ Page top
Were to find the components..
QuoteReply
# Jul 26 2003 at 3:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760424997
View User Forum
7 posts
Cat's Eye Agate and all casting components for symbols can now be found in the building behind the bank. Go up the stairs turn left, go straight to the wall. Turn a quick right and then a quick left and open the door. Talk to the guy on the left. It's an Erudite male.
▲ Page top
Center
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2003 at 3:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258059863
View User Forum
17 posts
I dont understand how this spell is better than Spell: Center?
▲ Page top
RE: Center
QuoteReply
# Oct 05 2003 at 11:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591789752562
14 posts
Actually, all symbol line spells can stack with the center line of spells. What this means is that you can cast Center and Symbol of Transal on a player to add a total of 78 HP and 5 AC. It's not that its better than center at this point, but that it augments center.
▲ Page top
Cats Eye Agate
QuoteReply
# May 27 2003 at 8:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257782987
4 posts
This component is easily purchased in Felwith upstairs in the House of Halos

component
QuoteReply
# Jan 25 2003 at 8:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591771678432
View User Forum
1 post
i've read that this spell requires a component Cats Eye Agate wich i discovered it can be found randomly of mobs such as recondite decievers, swindlers, pickpockets and cutpurses in the zone of Paludal Caverns off SH. hope i helped in some way for some pallies out there.
